{{CargoOrgan
|name=Black Cursebone
|type=Common
|rank=red
|id=10965
|idx=158
|description=An evil mage so drenched in dark magic that curse runes etched into his very skeleton. Truly rotten to the bone!
|skill=
|hp=2480
|def=246
|atk=293
|rush=283
|gene1=Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +1h
|gene2=Wind DMG +2%
|gene3=Earth DMG +2%
|gene4=Water DMG +2%
|gene5=Fire DMG +2%
|gene6=Poison DMG +2%
|gene7=All ELMT DMG +2.4% (Awakened)
|}}
